prompt: Create a bright, photorealistic vertical lifestyle photo of a young woman standing beside a cute compact hatchback car on a coastal road. The car has a rounded retro-modern body, a glossy two-tone paint scheme with pastel mint green lower panels and creamy white upper body and roof, circular headlights, small silver wheels, beige interior seats, and a charming kawaii-inspired design. The woman has short blonde bob hair, fair skin, a slim build, and wears a coordinated pale mint green summer romper with a matching short cardigan and flat strappy sandals; she stands casually in front of the driver-side door with one hand raised near her hair and one leg slightly crossed. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square beige privacy blur. Set the scene on sunlit asphalt with white parking lines, a low roadside guardrail, vivid blue ocean and clear blue sky in the background, warm midday natural light, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, clean travel-advertisement mood, realistic camera perspective, high detail, 2:3 portrait composition.
